meta.name: Sibling Prank Wars
meta.description: "Sibling Prank Wars" is a fun show where brothers and sisters pull off hilarious pranks. They compete to see who can create the funniest moments. The show is all about their playful rivalry and the laughs that come from their creative and silly pranks. In "Sibling Prank Wars," siblings compete against each other in a series of hilarious pranks, like setting up pranks to capture funny moments or making funny gags to trick each other. The goal is to keep the atmosphere playful and entertaining, showcasing the bonds and rivalry between siblings while delivering plenty of laughs.
